feed.title: FORCE RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-FRC-1E-E1) — firmware
feed.subtitle: Production firmware releases for SRAM RD-FRC-1E-E1.

entry.title: FORCE RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-FRC-1E-E1) — firmware 2.55.6
entry.summary:
FORCE RD XPLR MAX 46T RD-FRC-1E-E1 — firmware 2.55.6

Part: FIVAL FORCE RD 1x

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2026-06-23

entry.title: FORCE RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-FRC-1E-E1) — firmware 2.54.9
entry.summary:
FORCE RD XPLR MAX 46T RD-FRC-1E-E1 — firmware 2.54.9

Part: FIVAL FORCE RD 1x

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - Minor Bugfix and reliability improvement.

Released: 2026-03-04

entry.title: FORCE RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-FRC-1E-E1) — firmware 2.54.6
entry.summary:
FORCE RD XPLR MAX 46T RD-FRC-1E-E1 — firmware 2.54.6

Part: FIVAL FORCE RD 1x

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported.

Released: 2025-12-15

entry.title: FORCE RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-FRC-1E-E1) — firmware 2.53.8
entry.summary:
FORCE RD XPLR MAX 46T RD-FRC-1E-E1 — firmware 2.53.8

Part: FIVAL FORCE RD 1x

This firmware update contains platform updates.

Released: 2025-09-19

entry.title: FORCE RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-FRC-1E-E1) — firmware 2.53.1
entry.summary:
FORCE RD XPLR MAX 46T RD-FRC-1E-E1 — firmware 2.53.1

Part: FIVAL FORCE RD 1x

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements. This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2025-09-17

entry.title: FORCE RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-FRC-1E-E1) — firmware 2.49.1
entry.summary:
FORCE RD XPLR MAX 46T RD-FRC-1E-E1 — firmware 2.49.1

Part: FIVAL FORCE RD 1x

* Minor Bug Fixes, Platform updates and reliability improvements * Default shift assignment added for wireless blips

Released: 2024-05-29
